title: Add terminology convergence rule for equivalent external terms
summary: Create governance guidance requiring materially identical external terms to be listed directly under the StegVerse term before distinctions and examples.

claimed_relationships.notes: If two terms describe the same underlying concept, the wiki should expose that relationship directly on the target page.

non_claims: This proposal does not certify any specific external equivalence claim.
This proposal does not make StegVerse terminology superior to existing sector terminology.
This proposal does not replace formal proof or executable validation.
